li.label: used the toilet
li.description: Managed the toilet myself. Small thing. Still something.

li.label: made it
li.description: Made it to the toilet. Still means something.

li.label: made it!
li.description: Made it to da potty in time! I did it!

li.label: went potty!
li.description: Went potty! Did it! Yay!

li.label: settled
li.description: Settled. Warm. *content*

li.label: still capable
li.description: Used the toilet. Still capable. That matters more than it should.

li.label: still in control
li.description: Managed the toilet on my own. Still here. Still capable.

li.label: did it myself!
li.description: Went potty all by myself! I CAN do fings!

li.label: did it!
li.description: Went potty all by myself! I can! I can!

li.label: settled
li.description: Warm. Good. *content*

li.label: used the toilet
li.description: Used the toilet. Sure. Fine.

li.label: made it
li.description: Made it to the toilet. That just happens.

li.label: went potty
li.description: Went to da potty. Fine.

li.label: went potty
li.description: Went potty. Hmm.

li.label: settled
li.description: Settled. *murmuring*

li.label: used the toilet
li.description: Used the toilet. It worked. Still prefer my diaper.

li.label: made it I suppose
li.description: Made it to the toilet. Still miss my diaper.

li.label: went potty
li.description: Went to da potty. Miss my diapew though.

li.label: went potty
li.description: Went potty. Want diapew tho.

li.label: settled
li.description: Settled. Want diapew. *murmuring*

li.label: treated like a child
li.description: Marched to the toilet and supervised. Deeply humiliating.

li.label: made to go
li.description: Made to go to the toilet by a caretaker. Hate being treated like this.

li.label: made to go potty
li.description: Dey made me go potty. Don't wike dat.

li.label: no potty
li.description: Made to go potty. No no no.

li.label: settled after
li.description: All done. *settled*

li.label: led to the toilet
li.description: Taken to the toilet by hand. Like a toddler. No words for this.

li.label: forced and furious
li.description: Made to sit on the potty by a caretaker. Cannot believe this.

li.label: made to go potty
li.description: Dey MADE me go potty. Didn't want to. NOT FAIR.

li.label: no no potty
li.description: Don't WANNA go potty. NOT FAIR. No no no.

li.label: settled after
li.description: All done. *settled*

li.label: dragged to the toilet
li.description: Dragged to the toilet by someone who thinks I need supervising. Resent every step.

li.label: not my choice
li.description: Made to sit on the potty when I didn't choose to. Not okay.

li.label: not fair
li.description: Dey walked me dere and made me go and I said NO and dey didn't listen. NOT FAIR.

li.label: no no no potty
li.description: Don't WANNA potty. Said no no no and dey didn't listen. NOT FAIR.

li.label: settled after
li.description: All done. *settled*

li.label: wanted my diaper
li.description: Taken to the toilet when I wanted my diaper. Not what I wanted at all.

li.label: wanted my diaper
li.description: Made to use the toilet. My diaper was right there.

li.label: wanted my diapew
li.description: Had to go potty. Wanted my diapew. No fair.

li.label: want diapew not potty
li.description: Potty bad. Diapew good. Want diapew.

li.label: settled after
li.description: All done now. Want diapew. *settled*
